review_policy.promotion_rule: Review changed upstream references for reusable workflow lessons; do not copy third-party bodies, templates, resource lists, images, badges, or branding.

source_integrity.officiality_meaning: Exact upstream or home repository tracked for the capability; not repository-owner endorsement of omyKit.
source_integrity.specialist_skill_bar: Admit only omyKit-owned skills, first-party platform/tool sources, official upstream skill sources, mature infrastructure, or high-signal specialist references with clear non-overlapping value. Visual/UI community skill repos below 10000 stars stay out of omyKit routing and source tracking even if locally installed. Public stars are supporting evidence, not sufficient admission proof; PM, taste, catalog, or meta-UX references stay optional unless the user explicitly requests them.

sources.role: Official Superpowers reference for execution discipline, planning, debugging, TDD, verification, and review workflows

verification.reference_scope: Execution discipline, planning, TDD, debugging, review, and verification signals only; no workflow text copied.
